practical: Training round, assassin's fallback, low recoil, often fails to penetrate skull unless point blank.
visual: Tiny brass casing, lead nose, rimfire primer, almost toy-like.

practical: Pocket pistol ammo. Easily concealable. Weak but reliable for soft targets.
visual: Short stubby cartridge, rounded tip, brass or nickel casing.

practical: Global handgun staple. Balanced speed and mass. Moderate penetration. Still lethal.
visual: Sleek brass case, round-nosed bullet, matte copper jacket.

practical: Slow and heavy. Devastating to flesh, weak vs armor. Prone to flattening.
visual: Fat and short cartridge, wide hollow base, dark copper jacket.

practical: Designed to compromise between 9mm speed and .45 punch. Still compromises.
visual: Mid-size brass case, thick-walled projectile, clean copper top.

practical: Revolver hotshot. Great tissue disruption. Violent recoil, overpenetration risk.
visual: Chrome revolver round, long brass casing, pointed soft nose.

practical: High-energy automatic. Penetrates cars, barriers, and egos.
visual: Elongated .40 cal, copper-tipped, clean-cut jacket and shine.

practical: Light, fast, armor-tickling. Devours soft targets with low recoil.
visual: Thin bottleneck cartridge, long bullet, matte-black polymer tips.

practical: Exaggerated firepower. Kicks like a mule. Punches like a truck. Old-school menace.
visual: Oversized brass casing, lead hollow or soft-point tip, smoky patina.

practical: Eastern bloc rifle round. Zips through air and flesh with high velocity.
visual: Steel case, sharp ogive tip, thin neck, green or lacquer finish.

practical: Standard NATO rifle. Light recoil, decent armor defeat, high fragmentation.
visual: Pointed copper round, thin brass casing, combat-polished.

practical: Classic AK food. Thicker, slower, deeper penetration in tissue.
visual: Slightly tapered steel case, reddish sealant, blunt bullet tip.

practical: Full battle rifle power. Shreds cover. Long-range dominance.
visual: Long, wide cartridge, copper FMJ tip, polished brass sleeve.

practical: Civilian cousin with armor-piercing bite. Precision punch through bone or vest.
visual: Blackened tip, clean brass body, subtle engraved ring.

practical: Specialist subsonic beast. Quiet kill from suppressed setups. Moderate armor punch.
visual: Fat black bullet, short case, matte steel primer.

practical: Sniper god-tier. Anti-personnel at 1km+, light armor crack potential.
visual: Long, sleek bullet with matte black tip and burnished neck.

practical: Absolute hammer. Punches through walls, engines, god. Not for people.
visual: Massive rifle round, steel core, chromed tip, fearsome scale.
